Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' in variants that eventually lead to 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Frequency of activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' for cases where activity 'Completed + Closed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases containing 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' that also contain 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' compared to the total frequency of all 'Accepted + Wait -*' activities
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' out of all 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' occurrences in high-impact incidents (impact = 'High')
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of variants where 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' appears more than once
Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' that are directly preceded by 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Ratio of variants containing 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' to variants containing 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' in cases that do not include 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' does not occur

Name: Percentage of all 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' events that occur in the same case as at least one 'Completed + In Call' event
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average number of activities between 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and the next occurrence of 'Completed + Resolved'
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' grouped by country of the resource
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' activities grouped by the last value of resource country

Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' out of all cases

Name: Ratio of the frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' to the frequency of 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of process variants starting with 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' that include 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'
